evals.prompt: Analyze this workflow diagram in Whimsical: Jake. Tell me what it communicates and how you would improve the design, but don't edit it yet.
evals.expected_output: Finds the named Whimsical board, fetches details and an image, summarizes the workflow meaning, identifies design issues, and proposes a concise cleanup plan without modifying the board.

evals.prompt: Use your tools to make the Whimsical board called Jake more visually appealing while preserving the workflow meaning.
evals.expected_output: Fetches the board, applies a basic visual system with title, color-coded branches, clearer labels/callouts, spacing improvements, verifies with an image fetch, and reports the board URL plus changes made.

evals.prompt: Clean up my Whimsical board for a current vs proposed product flow. Make it easier for someone to understand in five seconds.
evals.expected_output: Asks for the target board if not provided, then analyzes semantic flow and applies safe readability/design improvements focused on title, path distinction, outcomes, spacing, and callouts.
